item.title: A MESSAGE FROM 20EE RSS SENDER
item.description: it's greeny again, i want to tell you that sora is gonna die soon.

item.title: A MESSAGE FROM 20EE RSS SENDER
item.description: Hello? it's greeny, i want to tell you that i want to root my moto g pure but it always fails, do i need a windows mac linux or chromeos flex pc or laptop?

item.title: STOP THE PKK ON OWOT!
item.description: i want the pkk to stop spamming in ourworldoftext.com

item.title: Sprint Evo
item.description: this is the evo 4g, this is android, which powers the evo. this is something nice someone said about the evo. so is this. ♪ and this. and all this. and this is something really, really nice that someone said about the evo. well, we thought it was nice. this is the htc evo 4g. with speech disabilities, deaf, hard-of-hearing and people only from sprint, the now network. access www.sprintrelay.com. ♪

item.title: aw shucks
item.description: I'LL WATCH AS YOU BLEED, FOR I WARNED YOU, AND WARNED YOU, YOU DID NOT HEED! IT'S YOUR FAULT! AND HER'S TOO. WHY I DID WHAT I DID... IT WAS ALL FOR YOU... AW SHUCKS!
